channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: ETH eyes a pivot: neutral RSI, mixed signals, risk of a choppy run to the $2,300 zone. 🔥🧊 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260406-price-prediction-eth-targets-2300-by-may-2026-despite #ETH #Crypto #PricePrediction

item.title: BTC sits at a crossroads: bears push, bulls watch; a breakout could push toward $75k by May 2026. 🚦 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260406-price-prediction-btc-targets-75000-by-may-2026-as #BTC #Bitcoin #PricePrediction

item.title: AAVE flickers at the edge: a dip to $90s could spark a bounce, or a break below seals further losses. 🚨 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260405-price-prediction-aave-targets-96-by-mid-april-as #AAVE #DeFi #CryptoNews
